name: mindguard-ai-backend
description: On-device AI backend for MindGuard AI (OSDHack 2026) — Transformers.js emotion classification (pretrained DistilRoBERTa model, ONNX Runtime Web), suggestion engine, browser notification scheduling, and a real IndexedDB-based database layer for users, journal entries, emotion logs, memories, and reminders.
notes: This package has no npm dependency on @huggingface/transformers by design — modelLoader.js imports it directly from a pinned jsDelivr CDN URL as a native ES module (see TRANSFORMERS_JS_CDN_URL in constants.js), so no bundler or npm install step is required. peerDependencies documents the expected version only; it is not installed by a package manager.
